section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a history of invasive ductal carcinoma of the right breast, stage 0, ER/PR positive.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Past medical history is typically documented in the subjective portion unless it is being actively synthesized or interpreted; here it is listed as background history rather than an assessment or diagnostic impression.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a history of prostate cancer and non-Hodgkin's lymphoma.
section_miscategorizations.reason: These are historical diagnoses being listed as background rather than an active assessment or differential; such past history is usually placed in the subjective section.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a history of heart disease.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is past medical history rather than a current diagnostic impression or problem synthesis, so it more appropriately belongs in the subjective history section.
